kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between 8 coins and 12 coins, one goes with Aldric and the other with Millpond.
Exactly two of Edmund, the artisan with 8 coins, and the artisan with 12 coins belong to the South Side.
Either Beatrix goes with 8 coins, or Millpond goes with 10 coins — but not both.
16 coins goes with at least one of Edmund or Eastcheap.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is at least 4 coins away from Beatrix.
16 coins goes with none of Aldric, Edmund, or Millpond.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is lower than both Godfrey and the artisan in Riverside.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is between Wulfric and Edmund.
The artisan with 6 coins belongs to the Market Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
